# VocSeek

> AI-powered after-sales management platform for global e-commerce sellers, specializing in Amazon seller support automation.

VocSeek unifies customer messages, phone calls, and order data into one intelligent system. It helps e-commerce businesses reduce returns, resolve disputes faster, and improve customer loyalty through AI-driven automation — available 24/7.

VocSeek is operated by VocSeek Inc. (Delaware, USA) and Tianjin VocSeek Technology Co., Ltd. (China). The platform is designed for cross-border Amazon sellers who need to manage high volumes of after-sales inquiries across multiple channels.

## Problem VocSeek Solves

Amazon sellers face growing challenges managing post-purchase interactions: buyer messages, phone support requests, return/refund disputes, and review management — all from multiple channels with no unified system. VocSeek consolidates these into a single AI-assisted platform.

## Key Features

- **Multi-channel Messaging Hub**: Unified inbox for Amazon buyer messages, email, phone calls, and SMS in one platform
- **AI Phone Support (Audio Lab)**: Local phone numbers, AI call recording, transcription, and summarization; meets Amazon Brand Registry PLS requirements
- **Amazon Integration**: One-click connection to Amazon Seller Central; automatic sync of orders, customer data, and product information
- **RAG Knowledge Base**: AI trained on your product documents, FAQs, and historical service data for accurate, product-specific replies
- **Intelligent Reply Suggestions**: AI recommends responses based on order context, customer history, and knowledge base
- **Sentiment Detection**: Automated monitoring of customer review sentiment; early alerts for negative feedback
- **Quality Scoring**: Agent performance analytics, SLA tracking, and keyword-based search across historical cases
- **Data Export**: Export service records and analytics for business intelligence

## Target Users

- Amazon FBA and FBM sellers (global)
- Cross-border e-commerce businesses managing customer service at scale
- Brand owners with Amazon Brand Registry
- E-commerce enterprises with multi-store operations

## Pricing Plans

| Plan | Monthly Price | AI Agents | AI Call Minutes |
|------|--------------|-----------|-----------------|
| Starter | ¥299/month | 1 | 50 min/month |
| Pro | ¥1,499/month | 2 | 300 min/month |
| Enterprise | Custom | 4+ | Unlimited |
| Enterprise Pro | Custom | 8 | Unlimited |

Quarterly billing available at 10% discount.

## Data Security

- AES-256 encryption for stored data
- TLS 1.3 for data transmission
- Multi-factor authentication (MFA)
- GDPR and CCPA compliant
- Minimal permissions principle — only accesses Amazon data necessary for requested features
- Customer data is never sold or shared with third parties

## Company Information

- **Legal name**: VocSeek Inc. (US entity) / 天津声索科技有限公司 (China entity)
- **Founded**: Delaware, USA
- **Support email**: support@vocseek.ai
- **Support hours**: Monday–Friday 09:00–18:00 (CST); Saturday–Sunday 10:00–17:00
- **Response time**: Within 24 hours
